name: Fruited Couscous Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup frozen orange juice concentrate, defrosted
1 cup fresh strawberries, hulled and halved
1 fresh peach, pitted and cut into 1/2-inch chunks
1 fresh plum tomatoes, pitted and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and salt in a 2-quart saucepan. Bring to boil over medium-high heat.
2. Stir in couscous. Cover. Remove from heat. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Fluff couscous lightly with a fork. Place in a medium mixing bowl. Set aside.
4. Combine concentrate, vinegar, sugar, oil, and peel in a 2-cup measure. Blend well with a whisk.
5. Add half of the juice mixture to the couscous. Mix well. Cover and chill at least 1 hour.
6. Add remaining juice mixture and the remaining ingredients to the couscous mixture. Toss gently to combine.
7. Line serving bowl with lettuce, if desired.
